idea: Weekly Surge in Google Trends for 'Warehouse Automation' Signals Industrial Sector Demand
behavior: An increasing interest in warehouse automation indicates growing investment and activity in industrial logistics and manufacturing automation.

market_impact.rationale: Increased searches for warehouse automation typically precede capital expenditure and growth in industrial sector companies.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly Google Trends interest for 'warehouse automation' rises by more than 15% from previous week
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or if interest drops below prior 4-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Google Trends data for this term frequently shows weekly fluctuations above 15% due to ongoing supply chain investment news.

idea: USGS Earthquake Activity Spike Near Major Freight Hubs Signals Temporary Freight Disruption
behavior: A sudden increase in earthquake tremors near major freight hubs can disrupt logistics and shipping routes, impacting industrial production.

market_impact.rationale: Freight disruptions impair industrial supply chains and manufacturing output, pressuring industrial stocks.

trade_logic.entry: If number of earthquakes with magnitude >3.0 near top 5 US freight hubs increases by 50% over 3 days
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or when earthquake activity normalizes to baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic activity near freight hubs occasionally clusters, creating short-term disruptions detectable in USGS data.

idea: Weekly Jump in Google Trends for 'Small Business Layoffs' Signals Consumer Discretionary Downturn
behavior: Rising searches for small business layoffs reflect stress in the labor market at the local level, often preceding reduced consumer spending.

market_impact.rationale: Small business layoffs indicate consumer income pressure and likely reduced discretionary spending.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly Google Trends interest for 'small business layoffs' increases by more than 20% vs prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 6 weeks or when interest falls below 10% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor stress signals on Google Trends for layoffs often spike multiple times a year in reaction to economic shifts.

idea: Daily Jump in OpenChargeMap EV Charger Counts Expansion Rate Signals Bullish Consumer Discretionary
behavior: A sudden acceleration in the number of new EV chargers installed signals increased EV adoption and consumer spending on EV-related products.

market_impact.rationale: Faster EV infrastructure growth supports higher EV sales and discretionary spending on related goods.

trade_logic.entry: If daily % increase in EV charger counts exceeds 0.5% over a 3-day rolling window
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when growth rate slows below 0.2%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily EV charger additions fluctuate regularly due to project completions and announcements.

idea: Weekly FRED Series Spike in Producer Price Index (PPI) Input Costs Signals Bearish Materials Sector
behavior: A sharp weekly rise in PPI input costs signals rising inflationary pressures on raw materials, squeezing margins in materials companies.

market_impact.rationale: Higher input costs reduce profitability for materials producers and pressure the sector.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly PPI input index rises by more than 1% vs prior week
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or when PPI input index growth slows below 0.3%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: PPI input measures frequently spike during commodity price volatility periods.

idea: Daily Surge in Google Trends for 'Home Office Setup' Signals Bullish Technology Sector
behavior: Increasing interest in home office setups signals sustained demand for technology hardware and software products.

market_impact.rationale: Greater home office investment drives sales for technology providers and peripherals.

trade_logic.entry: If daily Google Trends interest for 'home office setup' increases by 10% vs prior 3-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or when interest falls below prior 3-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily interest fluctuates with remote work news and product launches.

idea: Weekly Google Trends Spike for 'DIY Home Renovation' Signals Bullish Consumer Staples
behavior: Increased interest in DIY home renovation reflects consumer cost-saving behavior and boosts demand for staples and home improvement products.

market_impact.rationale: DIY activity drives sales for household staples and home maintenance goods.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly Google Trends interest for 'DIY home renovation' rises by over 12% vs prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 5 weeks or when interest drops below 5% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: DIY home improvement interest has seasonal and economic-driven weekly spikes.

idea: Daily Bounce Back in Freight Container Volumes After Sharp Decline Signals Industrial Sector Recovery
behavior: A rapid recovery in container volumes after a sudden drop signals resumption of supply chains and industrial activity.

market_impact.rationale: Improving freight flows indicate better industrial production and economic activity.

trade_logic.entry: If daily container volume rises by more than 3% after a 5% drop over prior 3 days
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or if volume falls below prior 7-day average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Container volume rebounds occur frequently after short disruptions.

idea: Weekly Google Trends Surge in 'Job Training Programs' Signals Bullish Industrial Sector
behavior: Rising searches for job training programs indicate increased labor reskilling efforts and hiring activity in industrial and manufacturing sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Enhanced workforce training supports industrial sector growth and productivity.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest for 'job training programs' rises over 15% vs prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 6 weeks or when interest returns below 5% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor training interest spikes with economic cycles and industrial hiring trends.

idea: Daily Spike in Weather-Series Wind Speed Variability Signals Bullish Utilities Sector

data.source: Open-Meteo daily weather wind speed data

behavior: Sudden increases in wind speed variability forecast higher wind energy generation, benefiting utilities with renewable portfolios.

market_impact.rationale: More wind energy generation reduces costs and boosts renewable utility earnings.

trade_logic.entry: If daily wind speed variance exceeds 120% of 10-day rolling average
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or when variance drops below 110% of average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Wind speed variability fluctuates daily due to weather patterns.

idea: Weekly Google Trends Surge for 'Political Insider Stock Buys' Signals Bullish Financial Sector

data.source: Scraped political insider filings from public tables

behavior: An increase in political insider stock purchase filings often precedes bullish sentiment in financial stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Political insiders buying stocks signals confidence, driving financial sector optimism.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly count of insider buy filings rises by 25% vs prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or when filings fall below prior average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Insider buying filings cluster around certain weeks each quarter.

idea: Daily Surge in Google Trends for 'Electric Bike Repair' Signals Bullish Consumer Discretionary
behavior: Increasing searches for e-bike repair reflect rising usage and consumer spending on alternative transportation products.

market_impact.rationale: More e-bike repairs indicate durable consumer demand and discretionary product sales.

trade_logic.entry: If daily search interest for 'electric bike repair' rises 15% vs prior 3-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or when interest returns below prior average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Daily interest spikes with seasonal and weather-related usage patterns.

idea: Weekly Google Trends Spike in 'Business Travel Rebound' Signals Bullish Industrial Sector
behavior: Increased searches for business travel indicate improving corporate mobility and related industrial activity.

market_impact.rationale: Business travel growth drives demand for industrial logistics and travel-related industrial goods.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest for 'business travel rebound' rises 20% vs prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 5 weeks or when interest declines below baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Business travel trends fluctuate with earnings seasons and pandemic policy changes.

idea: Daily Jump in Google Trends for 'Food Delivery Delay Complaints' Signals Bearish Consumer Staples
behavior: Rising complaints about food delivery delays reflect supply chain stress and may foreshadow consumer staples sales issues.

market_impact.rationale: Delivery delays reduce consumer satisfaction and hurt staples sector demand temporarily.

trade_logic.entry: If daily search interest for 'food delivery delay complaints' rises by 20% vs prior 3-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or when interest normalizes

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Food delivery complaints frequently spike due to weather or logistics issues.

idea: Weekly Increase in Google Trends for 'Home Solar Panel Installation Delay' Signals Bearish Utilities Sector
behavior: Growing interest in solar panel installation delays indicates local regulatory or supply bottlenecks hurting renewable energy adoption.

market_impact.rationale: Delays in solar adoption pressure utility sector renewables growth expectations.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search interest for 'solar panel installation delay' rises 15% vs prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 6 weeks or when interest falls below 5% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Installation delay searches spike with supply chain or local policy changes.
